title: PatchPoison: Poisoning Multi-View Datasets to Degrade 3D Reconstruction
comment: CVPR Workshop on Security, Privacy, and Adversarial Robustness in 3D Generative Vision Models (SPAR-3D), 2026
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has recently enabled highly photorealistic 3D reconstruction from casually captured multi-view images. However, this accessibility raises a privacy concern: publicly available images or videos can be exploited to reconstruct detailed 3D models of scenes or objects without the owner's consent. We present PatchPoison, a lightweight dataset-poisoning method that prevents unauthorized 3D reconstruction. Unlike global perturbations, PatchPoison injects a small high-frequency adversarial patch, a structured checkerboard, into the periphery of each image in a multi-view dataset. The patch is designed to corrupt the feature-matching stage of Structure-from-Motion (SfM) pipelines such as COLMAP by introducing spurious correspondences that systematically misalign estimated camera poses. Consequently, downstream 3DGS optimization diverges from the correct scene geometry. On the NeRF-Synthetic benchmark, inserting a 12 X 12 pixel patch increases reconstruction error by 6.8x in LPIPS, while the poisoned images remain unobtrusive to human viewers. PatchPoison requires no pipeline modifications, offering a practical, "drop-in" preprocessing step for content creators to protect their multi-view data.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文直接涉及3D高斯溅射（3D Gaussian Splatting）和3D重建，这是用户明确的研究兴趣。论文研究如何通过数据投毒来防止未经授权的3D重建，这直接关系到3D重建技术的安全性和隐私保护，属于3D重建技术的应用和影响研究。

AI.tldr: PatchPoison是一种轻量级数据集投毒方法，通过在图像边缘注入小的高频对抗性补丁来阻止未经授权的3D高斯溅射重建，同时保持图像对人类观察者不显眼。
AI.motivation: 3D高斯溅射技术使得从随意拍摄的多视角图像进行高真实感3D重建变得容易，但这引发了隐私问题：公开可用的图像或视频可能被利用来重建详细3D模型而未经所有者同意。
AI.method: PatchPoison在每张多视角数据集图像的边缘注入一个结构化棋盘格的高频对抗性补丁。该补丁旨在破坏SfM管道（如COLMAP）的特征匹配阶段，通过引入虚假对应点来系统性地误导估计的相机位姿。
AI.result: 在NeRF-Synthetic基准测试中，插入12×12像素的补丁使重建误差在LPIPS指标上增加了6.8倍，而投毒后的图像对人类观察者仍保持不显眼。
AI.conclusion: PatchPoison无需修改现有管道，为内容创作者提供了一种实用的"即插即用"预处理步骤来保护其多视角数据免遭未经授权的3D重建。

title: A Unified Conditional Flow for Motion Generation, Editing, and Intra-Structural Retargeting
summary: Text-driven motion editing and intra-structural retargeting, where source and target share topology but may differ in bone lengths, are traditionally handled by fragmented pipelines with incompatible inputs and representations: editing relies on specialized generative steering, while retargeting is deferred to geometric post-processing. We present a unifying perspective where both tasks are cast as instances of conditional transport within a single generative framework. By leveraging recent advances in flow matching, we demonstrate that editing and retargeting are fundamentally the same generative task, distinguished only by which conditioning signal, semantic or structural, is modulated during inference. We implement this vision via a rectified-flow motion model jointly conditioned on text prompts and target skeletal structures. Our architecture extends a DiT-style transformer with per-joint tokenization and explicit joint self-attention to strictly enforce kinematic dependencies, while a multi-condition classifier-free guidance strategy balances text adherence with skeletal conformity. Experiments on SnapMoGen and a multi-character Mixamo subset show that a single trained model supports text-to-motion generation, zero-shot editing, and zero-shot intra-structural retargeting. This unified approach simplifies deployment and improves structural consistency compared to task-specific baselines.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文涉及运动生成、编辑和重定向，与用户的"3D Generation"、"Physical Animation"和"Graphics"兴趣直接相关。论文使用生成模型进行运动编辑和结构重定向，属于3D内容生成和动画的范畴，特别是涉及骨骼结构和运动控制，与物理动画和图形学应用密切相关。

AI.tldr: 提出统一框架将文本驱动运动编辑和骨骼结构重定向视为同一生成任务，通过流匹配技术实现单一模型支持多任务
AI.motivation: 传统方法中，文本驱动运动编辑和骨骼结构重定向使用碎片化的流程，输入和表示不兼容。编辑依赖专门的生成引导，而重定向则推迟到几何后处理。需要统一框架简化部署并提高结构一致性。
AI.method: 采用流匹配技术，将编辑和重定向视为条件传输的实例。构建基于DiT风格变换器的整流流运动模型，联合条件化文本提示和目标骨骼结构。使用每关节标记化和显式关节自注意力严格强制运动学依赖，多条件分类器自由引导策略平衡文本遵循和骨骼一致性。
AI.result: 在SnapMoGen和Mixamo多角色子集上的实验表明，单一训练模型支持文本到运动生成、零样本编辑和零样本骨骼结构重定向。相比任务特定基线，统一方法简化了部署并提高了结构一致性。
AI.conclusion: 通过流匹配的统一视角，证明编辑和重定向本质上是同一生成任务，仅区别在于推理期间调节的是语义条件还是结构条件。提出的框架为运动生成和操控提供了简洁统一的解决方案。

title: MSGS: Multispectral 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: We present a multispectral extension to 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) for wavelength-aware view synthesis. Each Gaussian is augmented with spectral radiance, represented via per-band spherical harmonics, and optimized under a dual-loss supervision scheme combining RGB and multispectral signals. To improve rendering fidelity, we perform spectral-to-RGB conversion at the pixel level, allowing richer spectral cues to be retained during optimization. Our method is evaluated on both public and self-captured real-world datasets, demonstrating consistent improvements over the RGB-only 3DGS baseline in terms of image quality and spectral consistency. Notably, it excels in challenging scenes involving translucent materials and anisotropic reflections. The proposed approach maintains the compactness and real-time efficiency of 3DGS while laying the foundation for future integration with physically based shading models.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文直接扩展了3D高斯泼溅（3D Gaussian Splatting）技术，这是用户明确列出的研究兴趣之一。论文提出了多光谱3D高斯泼溅方法，属于3D生成和渲染领域，与用户的"Gaussian Splatting"、"3D Generation"、"Graphics"等兴趣高度相关。论文还涉及渲染质量和物理基础着色模型，与图形学应用直接相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了3D高斯溅射的多光谱扩展方法，通过为每个高斯添加光谱辐射度表示，结合RGB和多光谱信号的双重损失监督，在像素级进行光谱到RGB转换，提升了渲染质量和光谱一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有3D高斯溅射(3DGS)主要基于RGB信号，缺乏对光谱信息的建模能力。为了处理具有挑战性的场景（如半透明材料和各向异性反射），需要引入多光谱信息来提高渲染质量和物理准确性。
AI.method: 1. 为每个高斯添加光谱辐射度表示，使用每波段球谐函数；2. 采用RGB和多光谱信号的双重损失监督方案；3. 在像素级进行光谱到RGB转换，保留更丰富的光谱线索；4. 保持3DGS的紧凑性和实时效率。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和自采集的真实世界数据集上评估，相比仅使用RGB的3DGS基线，在图像质量和光谱一致性方面都有持续改进。特别是在涉及半透明材料和各向异性反射的挑战性场景中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功扩展了3DGS到多光谱领域，保持了原始方法的紧凑性和实时效率，同时为未来与基于物理的着色模型集成奠定了基础。在复杂材质场景中展现出显著优势。

title: Feed-Forward 3D Scene Modeling: A Problem-Driven Perspective
comment: 67 pages, 395 references. Project page: https://ff3d-survey.github.io. Code: https://github.com/ziplab/Awesome-Feed-Forward-3D. This work has been submitted to Springer for possible publication
summary: Reconstructing 3D representations from 2D inputs is a fundamental task in computer vision and graphics, serving as a cornerstone for understanding and interacting with the physical world. While traditional methods achieve high fidelity, they are limited by slow per-scene optimization or category-specific training, which hinders their practical deployment and scalability. Hence, generalizable feed-forward 3D reconstruction has witnessed rapid development in recent years. By learning a model that maps images directly to 3D representations in a single forward pass, these methods enable efficient reconstruction and robust cross-scene generalization. Our survey is motivated by a critical observation: despite the diverse geometric output representations, ranging from implicit fields to explicit primitives, existing feed-forward approaches share similar high-level architectural patterns, such as image feature extraction backbones, multi-view information fusion mechanisms, and geometry-aware design principles. Consequently, we abstract away from these representation differences and instead focus on model design, proposing a novel taxonomy centered on model design strategies that are agnostic to the output format. Our proposed taxonomy organizes the research directions into five key problems that drive recent research development: feature enhancement, geometry awareness, model efficiency, augmentation strategies and temporal-aware models. To support this taxonomy with empirical grounding and standardized evaluation, we further comprehensively review related benchmarks and datasets, and extensively discuss and categorize real-world applications based on feed-forward 3D models. Finally, we outline future directions to address open challenges such as scalability, evaluation standards, and world modeling.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文是关于前馈式3D场景建模的综述，直接涉及3D重建、几何表示等核心研究兴趣。论文讨论了从2D输入重建3D表示的方法，涵盖了隐式场到显式基元等多种几何输出表示，这与用户的"3D Reconstruction"、"Geometric"兴趣高度相关。此外，论文还涉及世界建模、模型设计策略等主题，与"World Model"兴趣相符。论文属于计算机视觉和图形学领域，与用户的多项兴趣直接匹配。

AI.motivation: 传统3D重建方法存在每场景优化慢或类别特定训练的限制，而前馈式3D重建方法虽然发展迅速，但现有研究多关注不同的几何输出表示。作者观察到这些方法共享相似的高层架构模式，因此提出一种不依赖输出格式的模型设计分类法。

AI.result: 建立了一个基于模型设计的前馈式3D重建分类框架，系统整理了该领域的研究方向。通过实证基础和标准化评估支持该分类法，为未来研究提供了清晰的路线图。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为前馈式3D重建领域提供了系统化的分析框架，指出了可扩展性、评估标准和世界建模等开放挑战，为未来研究方向提供了指导。

title: RobotPan: A 360$^\circ$ Surround-View Robotic Vision System for Embodied Perception
summary: Surround-view perception is increasingly important for robotic navigation and loco-manipulation, especially in human-in-the-loop settings such as teleoperation, data collection, and emergency takeover. However, current robotic visual interfaces are often limited to narrow forward-facing views, or, when multiple on-board cameras are available, require cumbersome manual switching that interrupts the operator's workflow. Both configurations suffer from motion-induced jitter that causes simulator sickness in head-mounted displays. We introduce a surround-view robotic vision system that combines six cameras with LiDAR to provide full 360$^\circ$ visual coverage, while meeting the geometric and real-time constraints of embodied deployment. We further present \textsc{RobotPan}, a feed-forward framework that predicts \emph{metric-scaled} and \emph{compact} 3D Gaussians from calibrated sparse-view inputs for real-time rendering, reconstruction, and streaming. \textsc{RobotPan} lifts multi-view features into a unified spherical coordinate representation and decodes Gaussians using hierarchical spherical voxel priors, allocating fine resolution near the robot and coarser resolution at larger radii to reduce computational redundancy without sacrificing fidelity. To support long sequences, our online fusion updates dynamic content while preventing unbounded growth in static regions by selectively updating appearance. Finally, we release a multi-sensor dataset tailored to 360$^\circ$ novel view synthesis and metric 3D reconstruction for robotics, covering navigation, manipulation, and locomotion on real platforms. Experiments show that \textsc{RobotPan} achieves competitive quality against prior feed-forward reconstruction and view-synthesis methods while producing substantially fewer Gaussians, enabling practical real-time embodied deployment. Project website: https://robotpan.github.io/

interest_filter.reason: 该论文提出了一个360度环绕视觉机器人系统，使用6个摄像头和LiDAR进行实时3D高斯重建和渲染。这直接涉及3D重建、高斯溅射（Gaussian Splatting）和几何处理等用户兴趣。论文的RobotPan框架预测度量尺度的紧凑3D高斯用于实时渲染和重建，与用户的3D生成、高斯溅射和3D重建兴趣高度相关。

AI.tldr: RobotPan：一个用于机器人360度环绕视觉的实时3D高斯预测框架，结合六摄像头和LiDAR，实现紧凑的度量尺度3D重建和实时渲染。
AI.motivation: 当前机器人视觉接口通常局限于狭窄的前向视野，多摄像头需要繁琐的手动切换，且运动抖动会导致头戴式显示器的模拟器病。需要一种能够提供完整360度视觉覆盖并满足实时部署约束的系统。
AI.method: 提出RobotPan框架，将多视角特征提升到统一的球坐标系表示，使用分层球形体素先验解码高斯，在机器人附近分配精细分辨率，在较大半径处分配较粗分辨率以减少计算冗余。在线融合更新动态内容，同时防止静态区域无限增长。
AI.result: 实验表明RobotPan在质量上与先前的前馈重建和视图合成方法具有竞争力，同时产生显著更少的高斯，实现了实用的实时部署。发布了专门用于机器人360度新视图合成和度量3D重建的多传感器数据集。
AI.conclusion: RobotPan系统结合六摄像头和LiDAR提供了完整的360度视觉覆盖，通过紧凑的3D高斯表示实现了实时渲染、重建和流式传输，满足了机器人导航和操作的实际部署需求。

title: Neural 3D Reconstruction of Planetary Surfaces from Descent-Phase Wide-Angle Imagery
summary: Digital elevation modeling of planetary surfaces is essential for studying past and ongoing geological processes. Wide-angle imagery acquired during spacecraft descent promises to offer a low-cost option for high-resolution terrain reconstruction. However, accurate 3D reconstruction from such imagery is challenging due to strong radial distortion and limited parallax from vertically descending, predominantly nadir-facing cameras. Conventional multi-view stereo exhibits limited depth range and reduced fidelity under these conditions and also lacks domain-specific priors. We present the first study of modern neural reconstruction methods for planetary descent imaging. We also develop a novel approach that incorporates an explicit neural height field representation, which provides a strong prior since planetary surfaces are generally continuous, smooth, solid, and free from floating objects. This study demonstrates that neural approaches offer a strong and competitive alternative to traditional multi-view stereo (MVS) methods. Experiments on simulated descent sequences over high-fidelity lunar and Mars terrains demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves increased spatial coverage while maintaining satisfactory estimation accuracy.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文涉及神经3D重建方法，直接匹配用户的"3D Reconstruction"兴趣。论文研究从下降阶段广角图像进行行星表面神经3D重建，属于3D重建的具体应用领域。虽然应用场景是行星表面，但核心方法是神经3D重建技术，与用户的3D重建兴趣高度相关。

AI.motivation: 行星表面数字高程建模对地质研究至关重要，但传统多视点立体方法在航天器下降过程中获取的广角图像上表现有限，存在径向畸变强、视差小、缺乏领域先验知识等问题。
AI.method: 开发了一种新颖的神经重建方法，采用显式神经高度场表示，利用行星表面连续、平滑、固态且无漂浮物体的先验知识，结合现代神经重建技术处理下降成像序列。
AI.result: 在高保真月球和火星地形模拟下降序列上的实验表明，该方法在保持满意估计精度的同时，实现了更大的空间覆盖范围，相比传统多视点立体方法更具竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 神经重建方法为行星下降成像提供了强大且具有竞争力的替代方案，通过结合领域特定先验知识，能够有效解决传统方法在径向畸变和有限视差条件下的局限性。

title: RadarSplat-RIO: Indoor Radar-Inertial Odometry with Gaussian Splatting-Based Radar Bundle Adjustment
summary: Radar is more resilient to adverse weather and lighting conditions than visual and Lidar simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM). However, most radar SLAM pipelines still rely heavily on frame-to-frame odometry, which leads to substantial drift. While loop closure can correct long-term errors, it requires revisiting places and relies on robust place recognition. In contrast, visual odometry methods typically leverage bundle adjustment (BA) to jointly optimize poses and map within a local window. However, an equivalent BA formulation for radar has remained largely unexplored. We present the first radar BA framework enabled by Gaussian Splatting (GS), a dense and differentiable scene representation. Our method jointly optimizes radar sensor poses and scene geometry using full range-azimuth-Doppler data, bringing the benefits of multi-frame BA to radar for the first time. When integrated with an existing radar-inertial odometry frontend, our approach significantly reduces pose drift and improves robustness. Across multiple indoor scenes, our radar BA achieves substantial gains over the prior radar-inertial odometry, reducing average absolute translational and rotational errors by 90% and 80%, respectively.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文直接涉及高斯溅射（Gaussian Splatting）在雷达SLAM中的应用，与用户的"Gaussian Splatting"兴趣高度相关。论文提出首个基于高斯溅射的雷达束调整框架，将高斯溅射作为密集可微分场景表示用于雷达惯性里程计，这直接属于高斯溅射在3D重建和SLAM中的应用范畴。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个基于高斯泼溅的雷达束调整框架，通过联合优化雷达位姿和场景几何，显著降低了雷达SLAM的漂移误差。
AI.motivation: 雷达SLAM在恶劣天气和光照条件下比视觉和激光雷达更具鲁棒性，但现有方法主要依赖帧间里程计，导致显著漂移。虽然回环检测可以纠正长期误差，但需要重访地点且依赖鲁棒的地点识别。视觉里程计通常使用束调整联合优化位姿和地图，但雷达的等效束调整方法尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出了首个基于高斯泼溅的雷达束调整框架，使用密集可微的场景表示方法。该方法利用完整的距离-方位-多普勒数据联合优化雷达传感器位姿和场景几何，首次将多帧束调整的优势引入雷达SLAM。
AI.result: 当与现有的雷达惯性里程计前端集成时，该方法显著降低了位姿漂移并提高了鲁棒性。在多个室内场景中，相比先前的雷达惯性里程计，平均绝对平移误差减少了90%，旋转误差减少了80%。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次实现了雷达束调整，通过高斯泼溅表示和联合优化方法，大幅提升了雷达SLAM的精度和鲁棒性，为雷达在恶劣环境下的定位和建图提供了新的解决方案。

title: DF3DV-1K: A Large-Scale Dataset and Benchmark for Distractor-Free Novel View Synthesis
summary: Advances in radiance fields have enabled photorealistic novel view synthesis. In several domains, large-scale real-world datasets have been developed to support comprehensive benchmarking and to facilitate progress beyond scene-specific reconstruction. However, for distractor-free radiance fields, a large-scale dataset with clean and cluttered images per scene remains lacking, limiting the development. To address this gap, we introduce DF3DV-1K, a large-scale real-world dataset comprising 1,048 scenes, each providing clean and cluttered image sets for benchmarking. In total, the dataset contains 89,924 images captured using consumer cameras to mimic casual capture, spanning 128 distractor types and 161 scene themes across indoor and outdoor environments. A curated subset of 41 scenes, DF3DV-41, is systematically designed to evaluate the robustness of distractor-free radiance field methods under challenging scenarios. Using DF3DV-1K, we benchmark nine recent distractor-free radiance field methods and 3D Gaussian Splatting, identifying the most robust methods and the most challenging scenarios. Beyond benchmarking, we demonstrate an application of DF3DV-1K by fine-tuning a diffusion-based 2D enhancer to improve radiance field methods, achieving average improvements of 0.96 dB PSNR and 0.057 LPIPS on the held-out set (e.g., DF3DV-41) and the On-the-go dataset. We hope DF3DV-1K facilitates the development of distractor-free vision and promotes progress beyond scene-specific approaches.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文与用户的多个研究兴趣直接相关：1) 3D重建（通过辐射场进行新视角合成），2) Gaussian Splatting（论文明确将其作为基准方法之一），3) 几何处理（新视角合成的核心是几何重建）。论文提出的DF3DV-1K数据集专门用于无干扰物的辐射场方法评估，这与3D重建和Gaussian Splatting的研究密切相关。

AI.motivation: 当前缺乏包含干净和杂乱图像的大规模真实世界数据集，限制了无干扰辐射场方法的发展，需要填补这一空白。
AI.method: 构建DF3DV-1K数据集，包含1,048个场景，89,924张图像，涵盖128种干扰类型和161个场景主题；创建DF3DV-41子集用于评估挑战性场景下的鲁棒性；基准测试9种无干扰辐射场方法和3D高斯泼溅方法。
AI.result: 数据集包含1,048个场景，89,924张图像；基准测试识别了最鲁棒的方法和最挑战的场景；通过微调基于扩散的2D增强器，在保持集上实现了平均0.96 dB PSNR和0.057 LPIPS的改进。
AI.conclusion: DF3DV-1K数据集填补了无干扰辐射场领域的数据空白，促进了无干扰视觉方法的发展，推动了超越场景特定方法的进展。

title: DiT as Real-Time Rerenderer: Streaming Video Stylization with Autoregressive Diffusion Transformer
summary: Recent advances in video generation models has significantly accelerated video generation and related downstream tasks. Among these, video stylization holds important research value in areas such as immersive applications and artistic creation, attracting widespread attention. However, existing diffusion-based video stylization methods struggle to maintain stability and consistency when processing long videos, and their high computational cost and multi-step denoising make them difficult to apply in practical scenarios. In this work, we propose RTR-DiT (DiT as Real-Time Rerenderer), a steaming video stylization framework built upon Diffusion Transformer. We first fine-tune a bidirectional teacher model on a curated video stylization dataset, supporting both text-guided and reference-guided video stylization tasks, and subsequently distill it into a few-step autoregressive model via post-training with Self Forcing and Distribution Matching Distillation. Furthermore, we propose a reference-preserving KV cache update strategy that not only enables stable and consistent processing of long videos, but also supports real-time switching between text prompts and reference images. Experimental results show that RTR-DiT outperforms existing methods in both text-guided and reference-guided video stylization tasks, in terms of quantitative metrics and visual quality, and demonstrates excellent performance in real-time long video stylization and interactive style-switching applications.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文专注于视频风格化，这是视频生成的一个重要子领域。用户兴趣包括"Video Generation"和"Interactive Video Generation"，而视频风格化是视频生成的一个直接应用，特别是交互式视频生成。论文提出的实时视频风格化框架与用户的视频生成兴趣高度相关。

AI.tldr: RTR-DiT：基于Diffusion Transformer的实时视频风格化框架，通过教师模型微调和蒸馏技术，支持文本引导和参考引导风格化，实现长视频稳定处理和实时风格切换。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散的视频风格化方法在处理长视频时难以保持稳定性和一致性，计算成本高且多步去噪过程不适用于实际应用场景，需要更高效、稳定的实时视频风格化解决方案。
AI.method: 1. 在精选视频风格化数据集上微调双向教师模型，支持文本引导和参考引导风格化；2. 通过后训练使用Self Forcing和Distribution Matching Distillation将教师模型蒸馏为少步自回归模型；3. 提出参考保留的KV缓存更新策略，支持长视频稳定处理和实时风格切换。
AI.result: RTR-DiT在文本引导和参考引导视频风格化任务中，在定量指标和视觉质量方面均优于现有方法，在实时长视频风格化和交互式风格切换应用中表现出色。
AI.conclusion: RTR-DiT框架成功解决了现有视频风格化方法在长视频处理中的稳定性和一致性难题，实现了实时高效的视频风格化，为沉浸式应用和艺术创作提供了实用解决方案。

title: Reconstruction of a 3D wireframe from a single line drawing via generative depth estimation
summary: The conversion of 2D freehand sketches into 3D models remains a pivotal challenge in computer vision, bridging the gap between human creativity and digital fabrication. Traditional line drawing reconstruction relies on brittle symbolic logic, while modern approaches are constrained by rigid parametric modeling, limiting users to predefined CAD primitives. We propose a generative approach by framing reconstruction as a conditional dense depth estimation task. To achieve this, we implement a Latent Diffusion Model (LDM) with a ControlNet-style conditioning framework to resolve the inherent ambiguities of orthographic projections. To support an iterative "sketch-reconstruct-sketch" workflow, we introduce a graph-based BFS masking strategy to simulate partial depth cues. We train and evaluate our approach using a massive dataset of over one million image-depth pairs derived from the ABC Dataset. Our framework demonstrates robust performance across varying shape complexities, providing a scalable pipeline for converting sparse 2D line drawings into dense 3D representations, effectively allowing users to "draw in 3D" without the rigid constraints of traditional CAD.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文涉及从2D线图重建3D模型，直接与用户的"3D Reconstruction"兴趣相关。论文使用生成式深度估计方法将2D草图转换为3D表示，这属于3D重建的核心范畴。虽然论文聚焦于线图重建而非视频或动态场景，但其3D重建方法与用户的几何、3D生成兴趣有明确关联。

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于潜在扩散模型的生成式方法，将2D手绘草图转换为3D模型，通过条件密集深度估计解决正交投影的模糊性问题，支持迭代式"草图-重建-草图"工作流程。
AI.motivation: 传统2D草图转3D模型方法存在局限性：基于符号逻辑的方法脆弱，现代参数化建模方法受限于预定义的CAD基元，限制了用户的创造自由。需要一种更灵活的方法来弥合人类创意与数字制造之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: 采用生成式方法，将重建任务定义为条件密集深度估计。使用带有ControlNet风格条件框架的潜在扩散模型（LDM）来解决正交投影的固有模糊性。引入基于图的BFS掩码策略来模拟部分深度线索，支持迭代式工作流程。使用从ABC数据集提取的超过100万张图像-深度对进行训练。
AI.result: 该方法在不同形状复杂度下表现出鲁棒性能，提供了一个可扩展的流水线，能够将稀疏的2D线图转换为密集的3D表示。有效实现了让用户"在3D中绘图"的目标，摆脱了传统CAD的刚性约束。
AI.conclusion: 提出的生成式方法成功解决了2D手绘草图到3D模型转换的关键挑战，通过条件深度估计框架和迭代工作流程支持，为创意设计提供了更灵活、可扩展的解决方案。

title: SocialMirror: Reconstructing 3D Human Interaction Behaviors from Monocular Videos with Semantic and Geometric Guidance
summary: Accurately reconstructing human behavior in close-interaction scenarios is crucial for enabling realistic virtual interactions in augmented reality, precise motion analysis in sports, and natural collaborative behavior in human-robot tasks. Reliable reconstruction in these contexts significantly enhances the realism and effectiveness of AI-driven interactive applications. However, human reconstruction from monocular videos in close-interaction scenarios remains challenging due to severe mutual occlusions, leading local motion ambiguity, disrupted temporal continuity and spatial relationship error. In this paper, we propose SocialMirror, a diffusion-based framework that integrates semantic and geometric cues to effectively address these issues. Specifically, we first leverage high-level interaction descriptions generated by a vision-language model to guide a semantic-guided motion infiller, hallucinating occluded bodies and resolving local pose ambiguities. Next, we propose a sequence-level temporal refiner that enforces smooth, jitter-free motions, while incorporating geometric constraints during sampling to ensure plausible contact and spatial relationships. Evaluations on multiple interaction benchmarks show that SocialMirror achieves state-of-the-art performance in reconstructing interactive human meshes, demonstrating strong generalization across unseen datasets and in-the-wild scenarios. The code will be released upon publication.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文与用户的多个研究兴趣直接相关：1) 3D Reconstruction（3D人体重建），2) Geometric（几何约束），3) 从单目视频重建3D人体行为属于3D生成和重建的核心领域。论文提出的SocialMirror框架专注于从单目视频重建3D人体交互行为，使用语义和几何指导来解决遮挡和运动模糊问题，这与用户的3D重建、几何和视频生成兴趣高度匹配。

AI.tldr: SocialMirror是一个基于扩散模型的框架，通过整合语义和几何线索来解决近距离交互场景中单目视频人体重建的挑战，包括严重遮挡、局部运动模糊和时空连续性中断等问题。
AI.motivation: 准确重建近距离交互场景中的人类行为对于增强现实中的虚拟交互、体育运动的精确动作分析以及人机协作任务中的自然协作行为至关重要。然而，由于严重的相互遮挡导致局部运动模糊、时间连续性中断和空间关系错误，单目视频中的近距离交互人体重建仍然具有挑战性。
AI.method: 提出SocialMirror框架：1) 利用视觉语言模型生成的高级交互描述来指导语义引导的运动填充器，幻觉化被遮挡的身体部分并解决局部姿态模糊；2) 提出序列级时间精炼器，强制执行平滑无抖动的运动，同时在采样过程中融入几何约束以确保合理的接触和空间关系。
AI.result: 在多个交互基准测试上的评估表明，SocialMirror在重建交互式人体网格方面实现了最先进的性能，在未见过的数据集和真实场景中表现出强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SocialMirror通过整合语义和几何线索，有效解决了近距离交互场景中单目视频人体重建的挑战，为增强现实、运动分析和人机协作等应用提供了可靠的重建解决方案。

title: Dehaze-then-Splat: Generative Dehazing with Physics-Informed 3D Gaussian Splatting for Smoke-Free Novel View Synthesis
summary: We present Dehaze-then-Splat, a two-stage pipeline for multi-view smoke removal and novel view synthesis developed for Track~2 of the NTIRE 2026 3D Restoration and Reconstruction Challenge. In the first stage, we produce pseudo-clean training images via per-frame generative dehazing using Nano Banana Pro, followed by brightness normalization. In the second stage, we train 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) with physics-informed auxiliary losses -- depth supervision via Pearson correlation with pseudo-depth, dark channel prior regularization, and dual-source gradient matching -- that compensate for cross-view inconsistencies inherent in frame-wise generative processing. We identify a fundamental tension in dehaze-then-reconstruct pipelines: per-image restoration quality does not guarantee multi-view consistency, and such inconsistency manifests as blurred renders and structural instability in downstream 3D reconstruction.Our analysis shows that MCMC-based densification with early stopping, combined with depth and haze-suppression priors, effectively mitigates these artifacts. On the Akikaze validation scene, our pipeline achieves 20.98\,dB PSNR and 0.683 SSIM for novel view synthesis, a +1.50\,dB improvement over the unregularized baseline.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文直接应用3D高斯泼溅(3D Gaussian Splatting)技术进行多视角烟雾去除和新视角合成，与用户的"3D Reconstruction"、"Gaussian Splatting"和"3D Generation"兴趣高度相关。论文还涉及物理信息损失函数和深度监督，与"Geometric"兴趣相关。虽然主要关注去雾而非动态重建，但核心的3D高斯泼溅技术是用户明确列出的研究兴趣。

AI.tldr: Dehaze-then-Splat：用于多视角烟雾去除和新视角合成的两阶段流水线，通过生成式去雾和物理信息辅助损失的3D高斯泼溅来解决单帧去雾与多视角一致性的矛盾
AI.motivation: 解决去雾-重建流水线中的基本矛盾：单帧图像恢复质量不能保证多视角一致性，这种不一致性会导致下游3D重建中的模糊渲染和结构不稳定问题
AI.method: 两阶段方法：第一阶段使用Nano Banana Pro进行逐帧生成式去雾生成伪干净训练图像，并进行亮度归一化；第二阶段训练3D高斯泼溅，结合物理信息辅助损失（深度监督、暗通道先验正则化、双源梯度匹配）来补偿逐帧生成处理带来的跨视角不一致性
AI.result: 在Akikaze验证场景上，新视角合成达到20.98dB PSNR和0.683 SSIM，比无正则化基线提高了+1.50dB
AI.conclusion: 基于MCMC的稠密化与早停策略，结合深度和烟雾抑制先验，能有效缓解去雾-重建流水线中的伪影问题，证明了物理信息辅助损失在补偿生成式去雾带来的多视角不一致性方面的有效性

title: Beyond Voxel 3D Editing: Learning from 3D Masks and Self-Constructed Data
summary: 3D editing refers to the ability to apply local or global modifications to 3D assets. Effective 3D editing requires maintaining semantic consistency by performing localized changes according to prompts, while also preserving local invariance so that unchanged regions remain consistent with the original. However, existing approaches have significant limitations: multi-view editing methods incur losses when projecting back to 3D, while voxel-based editing is constrained in both the regions that can be modified and the scale of modifications. Moreover, the lack of sufficiently large editing datasets for training and evaluation remains a challenge. To address these challenges, we propose a Beyond Voxel 3D Editing (BVE) framework with a self-constructed large-scale dataset specifically tailored for 3D editing. Building upon this dataset, our model enhances a foundational image-to-3D generative architecture with lightweight, trainable modules, enabling efficient injection of textual semantics without the need for expensive full-model retraining. Furthermore, we introduce an annotation-free 3D masking strategy to preserve local invariance, maintaining the integrity of unchanged regions during editing. Extensive experiments demonstrate that BVE achieves superior performance in generating high-quality, text-aligned 3D assets, while faithfully retaining the visual characteristics of the original input.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文直接涉及3D编辑和生成，与用户的"3D Generation"兴趣高度相关。论文提出的Beyond Voxel 3D Editing框架专注于3D资产的局部和全局修改，包括文本对齐的3D生成、语义一致性保持等技术，这些都是3D生成领域的核心问题。此外，论文还涉及3D掩码策略和数据集构建，与3D重建和几何处理也有一定关联。

AI.tldr: BVE框架通过自建大规模3D编辑数据集，在基础图像到3D生成架构上添加轻量可训练模块，实现高效文本语义注入和局部不变性保持，解决了现有3D编辑方法在多视图投影损失、体素编辑限制和数据缺乏方面的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有3D编辑方法存在显著局限性：多视图编辑方法在投影回3D时会产生损失，而基于体素的编辑在可修改区域和修改规模上都受到限制。此外，缺乏足够大的编辑数据集进行训练和评估也是一个挑战。
AI.method: 提出BVE框架，包含：1）自建专门针对3D编辑的大规模数据集；2）在基础图像到3D生成架构上增强轻量可训练模块，实现高效文本语义注入而无需昂贵的全模型重训练；3）引入无标注3D掩码策略来保持局部不变性，在编辑过程中保持未改变区域的完整性。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，BVE在生成高质量、文本对齐的3D资产方面实现了卓越性能，同时忠实地保留了原始输入的视觉特征。
AI.conclusion: BVE框架通过创新的数据集构建、轻量模块设计和局部不变性保持策略，有效解决了现有3D编辑方法的局限性，为高质量3D编辑提供了实用解决方案。

title: ClipGStream: Clip-Stream Gaussian Splatting for Any Length and Any Motion Multi-View Dynamic Scene Reconstruction
summary: Dynamic 3D scene reconstruction is essential for immersive media such as VR, MR, and XR, yet remains challenging for long multi-view sequences with large-scale motion. Existing dynamic Gaussian approaches are either Frame-Stream, offering scalability but poor temporal stability, or Clip, achieving local consistency at the cost of high memory and limited sequence length. We propose ClipGStream, a hybrid reconstruction framework that performs stream optimization at the clip level rather than the frame level. The sequence is divided into short clips, where dynamic motion is modeled using clip-independent spatio-temporal fields and residual anchor compensation to capture local variations efficiently, while inter-clip inherited anchors and decoders maintain structural consistency across clips. This Clip-Stream design enables scalable, flicker-free reconstruction of long dynamic videos with high temporal coherence and reduced memory overhead. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ClipGStream achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction quality and efficiency. The project page is available at: https://liangjie1999.github.io/ClipGStreamWeb/

interest_filter.reason: 该论文直接涉及高斯泼溅（Gaussian Splatting）在动态3D场景重建中的应用，与用户的"Gaussian Splatting"、"3D Reconstruction"、"4D Dynamic Reconstruction"和"Video Generation"兴趣高度相关。论文提出的ClipGStream方法专门解决长序列多视角动态场景重建问题，属于高斯泼溅在动态重建领域的直接应用。

AI.tldr: ClipGStream：一种混合动态3D场景重建框架，通过将长序列划分为短片段，在片段级别进行流优化，结合片段内时空场建模和片段间锚点继承，实现高时间一致性的长动态视频重建。
AI.motivation: 动态3D场景重建对于VR、MR、XR等沉浸式媒体至关重要，但现有方法存在局限性：基于帧流的方法可扩展但时间稳定性差，基于片段的方法能保证局部一致性但内存消耗大且序列长度受限。
AI.method: 提出Clip-Stream混合框架：将长序列划分为短片段，在片段内使用独立的时空场和残差锚点补偿高效建模局部动态变化，在片段间通过继承锚点和解码器保持结构一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明ClipGStream在长动态视频重建中实现了最先进的重建质量和效率，具有高时间一致性、无闪烁、内存开销低等优势。
AI.conclusion: ClipGStream通过片段级别的流优化设计，成功解决了长多视角动态序列重建中的时间一致性和可扩展性问题，为沉浸式媒体应用提供了有效的解决方案。

title: From Synchrony to Sequence: Exo-to-Ego Generation via Interpolation
summary: Exo-to-Ego video generation aims to synthesize a first-person video from a synchronized third-person view and corresponding camera poses. While paired supervision is available, synchronized exo-ego data inherently introduces substantial spatio-temporal and geometric discontinuities, violating the smooth-motion assumptions of standard video generation benchmarks. We identify this synchronization-induced jump as the central challenge and propose Syn2Seq-Forcing, a sequential formulation that interpolates between the source and target videos to form a single continuous signal. By reframing Exo2Ego as sequential signal modeling rather than a conventional condition-output task, our approach enables diffusion-based sequence models, e.g. Diffusion Forcing Transformers (DFoT), to capture coherent transitions across frames more effectively. Empirically, we show that interpolating only the videos, without performing pose interpolation already produces significant improvements, emphasizing that the dominant difficulty arises from spatio-temporal discontinuities. Beyond immediate performance gains, this formulation establishes a general and flexible framework capable of unifying both Exo2Ego and Ego2Exo generation within a single continuous sequence model, providing a principled foundation for future research in cross-view video synthesis.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文研究第三人称到第一人称视频生成（Exo-to-Ego video generation），直接涉及视频生成（Video Generation）和交互式视频生成（Interactive Video Generation）领域。论文关注跨视角视频合成中的时空连续性问题，与用户兴趣中的视频生成主题高度相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Syn2Seq-Forcing方法，通过将Exo-to-Ego视频生成重新定义为连续信号建模问题，解决了同步数据中的时空不连续性挑战。
AI.motivation: Exo-to-Ego视频生成面临的主要挑战是同步的外视角-第一人称视角数据中存在显著的时空和几何不连续性，这违反了标准视频生成基准中的平滑运动假设。这种同步引起的跳跃是核心难题。
AI.method: 提出Syn2Seq-Forcing方法，将源视频和目标视频之间的插值形成单一连续信号，将Exo2Ego重新定义为序列信号建模而非传统的条件-输出任务。这使得基于扩散的序列模型（如Diffusion Forcing Transformers）能够更有效地捕捉跨帧的连贯过渡。
AI.result: 实验表明，仅对视频进行插值（不进行姿态插值）已经能产生显著改进，强调主要困难源于时空不连续性。该方法为跨视角视频合成提供了原则性基础。
AI.conclusion: Syn2Seq-Forcing建立了一个通用灵活的框架，能够在单个连续序列模型中统一Exo2Ego和Ego2Exo生成，为未来跨视角视频合成研究提供了原则性基础。

title: Any3DAvatar: Fast and High-Quality Full-Head 3D Avatar Reconstruction from Single Portrait Image
summary: Reconstructing a complete 3D head from a single portrait remains challenging because existing methods still face a sharp quality-speed trade-off: high-fidelity pipelines often rely on multi-stage processing and per-subject optimization, while fast feed-forward models struggle with complete geometry and fine appearance details. To bridge this gap, we propose Any3DAvatar, a fast and high-quality method for single-image 3D Gaussian head avatar generation, whose fastest setting reconstructs a full head in under one second while preserving high-fidelity geometry and texture. First, we build AnyHead, a unified data suite that combines identity diversity, dense multi-view supervision, and realistic accessories, filling the main gaps of existing head data in coverage, full-head geometry, and complex appearance. Second, rather than sampling unstructured noise, we initialize from a Plücker-aware structured 3D Gaussian scaffold and perform one-step conditional denoising, formulating full-head reconstruction into a single forward pass while retaining high fidelity. Third, we introduce auxiliary view-conditioned appearance supervision on the same latent tokens alongside 3D Gaussian reconstruction, improving novel-view texture details at zero extra inference cost. Experiments show that Any3DAvatar outperforms prior single-image full-head reconstruction methods in rendering fidelity while remaining substantially faster.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文直接涉及3D头像生成和3D重建，与用户的"3D Generation"和"3D Reconstruction"兴趣高度相关。论文提出了一种从单张肖像图像快速重建完整3D头部的方法，使用3D高斯表示，这与用户的"Gaussian Splatting"兴趣直接匹配。此外，该方法关注几何完整性和纹理细节，与"Geometric"兴趣相符。

AI.tldr: Any3DAvatar：一种快速高质量的单图像3D高斯头部化身生成方法，最快可在1秒内重建完整头部，同时保持高保真几何和纹理。
AI.motivation: 现有单图像3D头部重建方法面临质量与速度的权衡：高保真方法依赖多阶段处理和逐主题优化，而快速前馈模型难以处理完整几何和精细外观细节。需要一种既能快速生成又能保持高质量的方法。
AI.method: 1. 构建AnyHead统一数据集，结合身份多样性、密集多视角监督和真实配饰；2. 从Plücker感知的结构化3D高斯支架初始化，执行一步条件去噪，将完整头部重建转化为单次前向传递；3. 在相同潜在标记上引入辅助视角条件外观监督，与3D高斯重建并行，提升新视角纹理细节。
AI.result: 实验表明，Any3DAvatar在渲染保真度上优于先前单图像完整头部重建方法，同时保持显著更快的速度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功解决了单图像3D头部重建中的质量-速度权衡问题，通过统一数据集、结构化初始化和辅助监督实现了快速高质量的头像生成。

title: Rethinking Image-to-3D Generation with Sparse Queries: Efficiency, Capacity, and Input-View Bias
summary: We present SparseGen, a novel framework for efficient image-to-3D generation, which exhibits low input-view bias while being significantly faster. Unlike traditional approaches that rely on dense volumetric grids, triplanes, or pixel-aligned primitives, we model scenes with a compact sparse set of learned 3D anchor queries and a learned expansion operator that decodes each transformed query into a small local set of 3D Gaussian primitives. Trained under a rectified-flow reconstruction objective without 3D supervision, our model learns to allocate representation capacity where geometry and appearance matter, achieving significant reductions in memory and inference time while preserving multi-view fidelity. We introduce quantitative measures of input-view bias and utilization to show that sparse queries reduce overfitting to conditioning views while being representationally efficient. Our results argue that sparse set-latent expansion is a principled, practical alternative for efficient 3D generative modeling.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文提出了一种高效的图像到3D生成框架SparseGen，直接涉及用户的"3D Generation"和"3D Reconstruction"兴趣。论文使用3D高斯基元进行场景建模，这与用户的"Gaussian Splatting"兴趣密切相关。方法关注几何表示和高效生成，也符合"Geometric"兴趣。虽然不直接涉及视频、4D或物理模拟，但核心的3D生成和重建技术是用户明确关注的方向。

AI.tldr: SparseGen是一个高效图像到3D生成框架，使用稀疏3D锚点查询和扩展算子生成局部3D高斯基元，显著降低内存和推理时间，同时减少输入视图偏差
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖密集体素网格、三平面或像素对齐基元，存在内存消耗大、推理时间长和输入视图偏差问题，需要更高效且减少过拟合的3D生成方法
AI.method: 使用紧凑的稀疏学习3D锚点查询集合，通过学习的扩展算子将每个变换后的查询解码为局部3D高斯基元集合，在无3D监督的整流流重建目标下训练
AI.result: 显著减少内存消耗和推理时间，保持多视图保真度，通过量化指标显示稀疏查询减少对条件视图的过拟合，同时保持表示效率
AI.conclusion: 稀疏集合潜在扩展是高效3D生成建模的原则性实用替代方案，在效率和减少输入视图偏差方面优于传统方法

title: Free Geometry: Refining 3D Reconstruction from Longer Versions of Itself
summary: Feed-forward 3D reconstruction models are efficient but rigid: once trained, they perform inference in a zero-shot manner and cannot adapt to the test scene. As a result, visually plausible reconstructions often contain errors, particularly under occlusions, specularities, and ambiguous cues. To address this, we introduce Free Geometry, a framework that enables feed-forward 3D reconstruction models to self-evolve at test time without any 3D ground truth. Our key insight is that, when the model receives more views, it produces more reliable and view-consistent reconstructions. Leveraging this property, given a testing sequence, we mask a subset of frames to construct a self-supervised task. Free Geometry enforces cross-view feature consistency between representations from full and partial observations, while maintaining the pairwise relations implied by the held-out frames. This self-supervision allows for fast recalibration via lightweight LoRA updates, taking less than 2 minutes per dataset on a single GPU. Our approach consistently improves state-of-the-art foundation models, including Depth Anything 3 and VGGT, across 4 benchmark datasets, yielding an average improvement of 3.73% in camera pose accuracy and 2.88% in point map prediction. Code is available at https://github.com/hiteacherIamhumble/Free-Geometry .

interest_filter.reason: 该论文直接涉及3D重建，这是用户的核心兴趣之一。论文提出了一种改进3D重建质量的方法，通过自监督学习在测试时优化重建模型，这与用户的"3D Reconstruction"兴趣高度相关。此外，该方法涉及几何一致性、多视角特征对齐等几何处理，也与用户的"Geometric"兴趣相符。

AI.tldr: Free Geometry框架让前馈式3D重建模型在测试时能够自我进化，通过自监督学习提升重建质量，无需3D真值标注
AI.motivation: 前馈式3D重建模型虽然高效但缺乏适应性，测试时无法根据具体场景调整，导致在遮挡、镜面反射和模糊线索等情况下出现错误
AI.method: 利用多视角一致性原理，通过掩码部分帧构建自监督任务，强制完整观察和部分观察之间的跨视角特征一致性，同时保持被遮挡帧的成对关系，使用轻量级LoRA更新进行快速重新校准
AI.result: 在4个基准数据集上持续改进包括Depth Anything 3和VGGT在内的最先进基础模型，相机姿态精度平均提升3.73%，点云图预测平均提升2.88%，单GPU上每个数据集耗时不到2分钟
AI.conclusion: Free Geometry框架成功实现了前馈式3D重建模型在测试时的自适应能力，通过自监督学习显著提升了重建质量，为3D重建领域提供了有效的测试时优化方案

title: Geometric Context Transformer for Streaming 3D Reconstruction
summary:
Streaming 3D reconstruction aims to recover 3D information, such as camera poses and point clouds, from a video stream, which necessitates geometric accuracy, temporal
  consistency, and computational efficiency. Motivated by the principles of Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM), we introduce LingBot-Map, a feed-forward 3D foundation
  model for reconstructing scenes from streaming data, built upon a geometric context transformer (GCT) architecture. A defining aspect of LingBot-Map lies in its carefully
  designed attention mechanism, which integrates an anchor context, a pose-reference window, and a trajectory memory to address coordinate grounding, dense geometric cues, and
  long-range drift correction, respectively. This design keeps the streaming state compact while retaining rich geometric context, enabling stable efficient inference at around
  20 FPS on 518 x 378 resolution inputs over long sequences exceeding 10,000 frames. Extensive evaluations across a variety of benchmarks demonstrate that our approach
  achieves superior performance compared to both existing streaming and iterative optimization-based approaches.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文直接涉及用户的核心研究兴趣"3D Reconstruction"（3D重建）。论文标题为"Geometric Context Transformer for Streaming 3D Reconstruction"，专注于从视频流中进行3D重建，这与用户的"3D Reconstruction"兴趣完全匹配。此外，论文还涉及几何准确性（与"Geometric"兴趣相关）、SLAM原理（与3D重建密切相关）以及实时处理（与流式处理相关）。论文的流式3D重建主题是用户3D重建兴趣的直接应用和子领域。

AI.tldr: LingBot-Map是一个基于几何上下文Transformer架构的前馈3D基础模型，用于从视频流中实时重建3D场景，在保持几何精度和时间一致性的同时达到约20FPS的处理速度。
AI.motivation: 流式3D重建需要从视频流中恢复相机姿态和点云等3D信息，这要求几何精度、时间一致性和计算效率。受SLAM原理启发，需要开发能够处理长序列、解决坐标定位、密集几何线索和长距离漂移校正等挑战的实时重建方法。
AI.method: 基于几何上下文Transformer架构，设计了特殊的注意力机制，集成了锚点上下文、姿态参考窗口和轨迹记忆三个组件，分别处理坐标定位、密集几何线索和长距离漂移校正问题，保持流式状态紧凑同时保留丰富的几何上下文。
AI.result: 在518×378分辨率输入上，能够在超过10,000帧的长序列中实现约20FPS的稳定高效推理。在多个基准测试中，相比现有的流式方法和迭代优化方法都取得了优越的性能。
AI.conclusion: LingBot-Map通过精心设计的注意力机制，成功解决了流式3D重建中的关键挑战，实现了高效、准确的实时场景重建，为3D基础模型在流式数据处理中的应用提供了有效解决方案。

title: SpatialEvo: Self-Evolving Spatial Intelligence via Deterministic Geometric Environments
summary: Spatial reasoning over three-dimensional scenes is a core capability for embodied intelligence, yet continuous model improvement remains bottlenecked by the cost of geometric annotation. The self-evolving paradigm offers a promising path, but its reliance on model consensus to construct pseudo-labels causes training to reinforce rather than correct the model's own geometric errors. We identify a property unique to 3D spatial reasoning that circumvents this limitation: ground truth is a deterministic consequence of the underlying geometry, computable exactly from point clouds and camera poses without any model involvement. Building on this insight, we present SpatialEvo, a self-evolving framework for 3D spatial reasoning, centered on the Deterministic Geometric Environment (DGE). The DGE formalizes 16 spatial reasoning task categories under explicit geometric validation rules and converts unannotated 3D scenes into zero-noise interactive oracles, replacing model consensus with objective physical feedback. A single shared-parameter policy co-evolves across questioner and solver roles under DGE constraints: the questioner generates physically valid spatial questions grounded in scene observations, while the solver derives precise answers against DGE-verified ground truth. A task-adaptive scheduler endogenously concentrates training on the model's weakest categories, producing a dynamic curriculum without manual design. Experiments across nine benchmarks demonstrate that SpatialEvo achieves the highest average score at both 3B and 7B scales, with consistent gains on spatial reasoning benchmarks and no degradation on general visual understanding.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文专注于3D空间推理和几何环境，与用户的"3D Reconstruction"、"Geometric"和"World Model"兴趣直接相关。论文提出的Deterministic Geometric Environment (DGE)框架处理三维场景的几何验证，涉及点云和相机姿态，这些是3D重建和几何理解的核心技术。

AI.tldr: SpatialEvo：基于确定性几何环境的3D空间推理自演化框架，通过几何验证规则而非模型共识生成无噪声训练数据，实现模型在问答角色间的协同进化
AI.motivation: 三维场景空间推理是具身智能的核心能力，但连续模型改进受限于几何标注成本。现有自演化范式依赖模型共识构建伪标签，导致训练强化而非纠正模型的几何错误
AI.method: 提出确定性几何环境（DGE），将16个空间推理任务类别形式化为显式几何验证规则，将未标注3D场景转换为零噪声交互式oracle。单一共享参数策略在问答角色间协同演化：提问者基于场景观察生成物理有效的空间问题，解答者根据DGE验证的真值推导精确答案。任务自适应调度器内生地集中训练模型最弱类别
AI.result: 在9个基准测试中，SpatialEvo在3B和7B规模上均获得最高平均分数，在空间推理基准上取得一致增益，且在通用视觉理解上无性能下降
AI.conclusion: 通过利用3D空间推理的确定性几何特性，SpatialEvo框架成功绕过了自演化训练中的模型共识限制，实现了无需人工标注的高效模型改进，为具身智能的空间推理能力发展提供了新路径

title: Seedance 2.0: Advancing Video Generation for World Complexity
summary: Seedance 2.0 is a new native multi-modal audio-video generation model, officially released in China in early February 2026. Compared with its predecessors, Seedance 1.0 and 1.5 Pro, Seedance 2.0 adopts a unified, highly efficient, and large-scale architecture for multi-modal audio-video joint generation. This allows it to support four input modalities: text, image, audio, and video, by integrating one of the most comprehensive suites of multi-modal content reference and editing capabilities available in the industry to date. It delivers substantial, well-rounded improvements across all key sub-dimensions of video and audio generation. In both expert evaluations and public user tests, the model has demonstrated performance on par with the leading levels in the field. Seedance 2.0 supports direct generation of audio-video content with durations ranging from 4 to 15 seconds, with native output resolutions of 480p and 720p. For multi-modal inputs as reference, its current open platform supports up to 3 video clips, 9 images, and 3 audio clips. In addition, we provide Seedance 2.0 Fast version, an accelerated variant of Seedance 2.0 designed to boost generation speed for low-latency scenarios. Seedance 2.0 has delivered significant improvements to its foundational generation capabilities and multi-modal generation performance, bringing an enhanced creative experience for end users.

interest_filter.reason: 这篇论文直接涉及视频生成，这是用户明确的研究兴趣之一。Seedance 2.0是一个多模态音频-视频生成模型，专注于视频生成能力的提升，包括文本、图像、音频和视频作为输入的多模态生成。这与用户的"Video Generation"和"Interactive Video Generation"兴趣高度相关。

AI.tldr: Seedance 2.0是中国2026年初发布的新型原生多模态音视频生成模型，采用统一高效的大规模架构，支持文本、图像、音频、视频四种输入模态，提供行业最全面的多模态内容参考和编辑能力，在音视频生成各方面均有显著提升。
AI.motivation: 开发更先进的多模态音视频生成模型，超越前代Seedance 1.0和1.5 Pro，提供更全面的多模态输入支持和更强的生成能力，满足用户对高质量音视频内容创作的需求。
AI.method: 采用统一、高效、大规模的多模态音视频联合生成架构，支持四种输入模态（文本、图像、音频、视频），整合行业最全面的多模态内容参考和编辑能力，并开发了加速版本Seedance 2.0 Fast用于低延迟场景。
AI.result: 模型在专家评估和公开用户测试中达到领域领先水平，支持生成4-15秒的音视频内容，原生输出分辨率480p和720p，开放平台支持最多3个视频片段、9张图像和3个音频片段作为多模态输入参考。
AI.conclusion: Seedance 2.0在基础生成能力和多模态生成性能方面均有显著改进，为用户提供了增强的创作体验，代表了多模态音视频生成技术的重要进展。
